Events
  • (19:00) Thursday 5 Dec 2019 - NYU  Isiah Medina, “Remembering the Future” - Lecture (Hosted by Kinet)
  • (19:00) Friday 20 Dec 2019 - Deptford Cinema, London  Nanterre Personne by Angelina Battais, Breaking and Entering / Rained Last Night / Late Embryo / Shooting Star Summer Solstice by Kelley Dong, Eden is a Cave by Alexandre Galmard, 88:88 by Isiah Medina
  • (18:30) Saturday 11 Apr 2020 - Twitch  Isiah Medina, Masterclass for Berlin Revolution
  • (16:30) Sunday 6 Sep 2020 - Garage Museum of Contemporary Art (Moscow)  Inventing the Future screening + discussion with film critic Alexey Artamonov, art historian Boris Klyushnikov, and philosopher Nikita Sazonov on the problems of transferring philosophical texts to the screen, the ideas of left-wing accelerationism, and the aesthetics of Isiah Medina.
  • (18:45) Saturday 27 Feb 2021 - Cineteca Madrid  Inventing the Future screening
  • (13:00) Thursday 3 Jun 2021 - Ruskin School of Art, University of Oxford  “Towards a Theory of Film Production” a lecture by Isiah Medina
  • (20:00) Sunday 11 Jul 2021 - Museum of Modern Art of Odessa, Ukraine  Inventing the Future screening, via Muzeon Experimental Centre
  • (20:00) Friday 16 Jul 2021 - Spectacle Theater  Worlds theatrical premiere
  • (20:00) Wednesday 21 Jul 2021 - Typography Centre For Contemporary Art, Russia  Inventing the Future screening
  • (00:00) Tuesday 28 Sep 2021 - Massachussetts College of Art and Design  Isiah Medina in dialogue with the MassArt Ciné-Culture audience about his work
  • (11:00) Friday 25 Mar 2022 - NSCAD University  “The Object of Cinema is Names”, lecture by Isiah Medina
  • (11:00) Sunday 1 May 2022 - Jeonju International Film Festival  Night is Limpid World Premiere + Q&A
  • (18:00) Tuesday 24 May 2022 - Arts Santa Mònica  Inventing the Future screening and Q&A
  • (19:00) Friday 29 Jul 2022 - Spectacle Theater  88:88 screening + Q&A as part of the ISIAH MEDINA: FILMS 2010-2020 Retrospective
  • (17:00) Saturday 30 Jul 2022 - Spectacle Theater  From Paint Tube to YouTube: Short Films by Isiah Medina screening + Q&A as part of the ISIAH MEDINA: FILMS 2010-2020 Retrospective
  • (19:00) Saturday 30 Jul 2022 - Spectacle Theater  Inventing the Future screening + Q&A as part of the ISIAH MEDINA: FILMS 2010-2020 Retrospective

  • (21:00) Thursday 10 Nov 2022 - Fox Theatre, Toronto  Screening of idizwadidiz, log 2, and Night is Limpid
